// AUTO-GENERATED by kyo-ffi-codegen v1. DO NOT EDIT.
// Regenerate via `sbt compile` after modifying the binding trait.

package kyo.example

import scala.scalajs.js
import scala.scalajs.js.annotation.*
import scala.scalajs.js.typedarray.*
import scala.scalajs.reflect.annotation.EnableReflectiveInstantiation
import kyo.ffi.*
import kyo.ffi.internal.{AbiCheck, JsRawSegment, KoffiFacade, KoffiFn, NativeLoader, StructAbiCheck}

@EnableReflectiveInstantiation final class BorrowedStringBindingsImpl extends BorrowedStringBindings:
    import BorrowedStringBindingsImpl.*

    def getenvLike(name: String)(using kyo.AllowUnsafe): Ffi.Borrowed[String] =
        val retVal = facade.getenvLike(name).asInstanceOf[String]
        Ffi.Borrowed.wrap(retVal)
end BorrowedStringBindingsImpl

object BorrowedStringBindingsImpl:
    AbiCheck.verify(1, "kyo.example.BorrowedStringBindings")
    private val facade = KoffiFacade.load(
        NativeLoader.jsResolve("kyo_borrowed_str"),
        Seq(
            KoffiFn("getenvLike", "getenv", "string", Seq[js.Any]("string".asInstanceOf[js.Any]))
        )
    )
end BorrowedStringBindingsImpl
